summary: Recording is missing the expected “Row Jimmy” track and contains an incorrect “Ramble on Rose” from another show, rendering it unusable.
review: The reviewer reports that the download lacks the promised “Row Jimmy” and instead includes a random “Ramble on Rose” taken from the 9/20/90 Photoleon matrix. No comments are made about the audio fidelity or performance because the tracklist is incorrect, making the recording essentially faulty.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, rating it 0 stars and complaining about missing/incorrect tracks; both show and recording quality cannot be assessed positively.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Missing expected track (Row Jimmy) and includes an incorrect track from another concert, indicating a file or metadata error.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Cannot evaluate set flow due to missing track and erroneous inclusion.
